description: A driver's medical certificate is about to expire. A compliance manager must get the new certificate and update their file.

nodes.task_description: Receive a system alert that a driver's medical card expires in 30 days.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is notified of the pending expiration.

nodes.task_description: Send an automated notification to the driver reminding them to renew their medical certificate.

expected_outcome.value: The driver is reminded of the requirement.

nodes.task_description: The driver uploads a photo of their new medical card.
Update the driver's qualification file with the new medical card and its expiration date.

expected_outcome.value: The driver's file is now up-to-date and compliant.
